title: minuartia aretioides subsp. cherlerioides
intro: Minuartia aretioides subsp. cherlerioides, also known as the Cherry Pinks or Alpine Pink, is a flowering plant species belonging to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. Minuartia aretioides subsp. cherlerioides is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
